description: In SolveSpace, design a 3D cylindrical spacer with an outer diameter of 24.0 mm, an inner hole diameter of 8.0 mm, and an extruded height of 12.0 mm. Save the SolveSpace project to /home/ga/Documents/SolveSpace/spacer.slvs and export the 3D model as a triangle mesh to /home/ga/Documents/SolveSpace/spacer.stl.
